recommended_actions.description: Immediately halt and quarantine affected shipment at nearest depot
recommended_actions.reasoning: Standard operating procedure for unhandled temperature breaches to ensure safety.

recommended_actions.description: Send automated breach notifications to logistics and quality control teams
recommended_actions.reasoning: Required to trigger manual intervention since AI analysis failed.

recommended_actions.description: Schedule a manual quality inspection of the cargo
recommended_actions.reasoning: Must verify product integrity before any further movement or disposal.

result.message:
Subject: URGENT: Cold Chain Breach Notification - SHIP-004

Dear Client,

We are writing to inform you of a temperature breach (Incident INC-5C228989) involving your shipment SHIP-004 containing API Error. Sensors recorded a temperature of 16.5C, exceeding the safe limit of 8.0C.

We apologize for this disruption. The shipment has been quarantined immediately to prevent compromised goods from reaching you. We are automatically expediting a replacement order to minimize delays.

Thank you for your understanding. We will provide tracking details for the replacement shortly.

result.details: Schedule a manual quality inspection of the cargo
